calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Maureen O'Neill, Appellant/Defendant, appearing in pro per.
Charles McDaniel, Respondent/Plaintiff, appearing in pro per. Kimberly McDaniel, Respondent/Plaintiff, did not appear.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Both appearing parties are sworn.

Charles McDaniel testifies on his behalf. The following exhibits are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Letter dated 9/4/08 to Maureen O'Neill from Kimberly McDaniel.
Exhibit 2 - Letter from Consumer Protective Unit
Exhibit 3 - Copy of Notice of Entry of Judgment
Exhibit 4 - Copy of Notice of Entry of Judgment

Maureen O'Neill testifies on her behalf. Exhibits are not introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk M. Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported (D602).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
